blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is

panels.label: What it is not

panels.body: Ask how it differs from nearby concepts and what changes when the term is applied. Compare it against nearby concepts so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.
